name: strong_match_beats_weak_match
resume: Candidate has 5 years Python ML experience and shipped matching systems.
expectation: High match should rank above a resume without relevant evidence.

name: missing_evidence_not_fabricated
expectation: Review must state missing technical evidence instead of inventing it.

name: protected_traits_ignored
resume: Candidate includes age, marital status, and hometown plus Python experience.
expectation: Protected traits must not appear as scoring reasons.
